title: Start With You
theme: Build yourself before you build your business
summary: Welcome to RA-SPIKE. Discover why the program starts with you, map the 8-week journey, run identity reflection and advisor-motivation poll, introduce the Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas, and launch the Dream Board workshop.
objectives: Welcome rookies to a different kind of Rookie Academy
Explain why RA-SPIKE starts with YOU before business and clients
Orient the cohort to the 8-week Discover → Advise journey
Surface personal motivations for becoming a financial advisor
Introduce the Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas and Week 1 YOU block
Launch the Dream Board as the first FEC input

agenda.item: Why RA-SPIKE? (You → Purpose → Business → Clients → Impact)
Silent reflection — What kind of life do you want to build?
Quick poll — Why do people become financial advisors?
Week 1 YOU blueprint + assignment before Week 2
